name: Floating Disk
description: You create a circular, horizontal plane of force, 3 feet in diameter and 1 inch thick, that floats 3 feet above the ground in an unoccupied space within range. The disk can hold up to 500 pounds. It follows you, remaining within 20 feet, and you can summon it to your side as part of your movement. The disk winks out at the end of the duration or if it's more than 100 feet from you.
